rank 1 (cost: 20): you charge at your en.text: Rank 1 (Cost: 20): You charge at your enemy and instantly cast two Savage I attacks. If your target is suffering from Black Plague I and Blistering Malady II, you will issue a third Savage I. 30 second recast.

resolute minion i: increase pet regenera.text: Resolute Minion I: Increase pet regeneration by 750,000 hitpoints per tick.

ordered_lines.text: Hello Fawupuruen, I can assist your with your Talents. You may purchase up to 60 using Tier 7 credits, and up to 80 using Tier 8 credits. What would you like to do today?
Tier 2 Talents require a mininum of 20 talent points spent.
Tier 3 Talents require a mininum of 40 talent points spent.
Ranks 1-20: Up to 100% chance to trigger two additional Swamp Claw I on cast. Increases by 5% per rank.
Ranks 11-20: Up to 60% chance to trigger an additional two more Swamp Claw I on cast. Increases by 3% per rank.
To purchase a Talent just click the + button next to it. You will not be charged a point until you confirm your purchase. You may also view the Talent information after clicking the + button!
Rank 1 (Cost: 5): Black Plague I will now be cast on all enemies within 60 yards.
Ranks 1-20: Up to 100% chance to cast Blistering Malady II on all targets when using Savage I. Increases by 2% per rank.
Ranks 11-20: Up to 60% chance to trigger an additional Savagery I on cast. Increases by 2% per rank.
Rank 1 (Cost: 5): You learn a new spell: Blissful Malaise I.
Blissful Malaise I: High HP single-target heal.
Rank 1 (Cost: 5): You pet will receive Enraged Minion I & Resolute Minion I and after casting Seethe I.
Enraged Minion I: Increase pet v2 haste by 30%, Flurry chance by 250% for 30 seconds.
Resolute Minion I: Increase pet regeneration by 750,000 hitpoints per tick.
Rank 1 (Cost: 5): when casting Seethe I you transform all current minions summoned by Wild Cascade I into ancient beasts, increasing their minimum damage and maximum damage by 500%. 30 second recast.
Ranks 1-5: Up to 100% chance to trigger a second Boon of the Summoner II on cast. Increases by 20% per rank.
Talent Purchase: Call of the Wild
Ranks 1-10: Up to 100% chance to trigger an additional servant when casting Wild Cascade I. Increases by 10% per rank.
Ranks 6-10: Up to 60% chance to trigger a second another additional servants when casting Wild Cascade I. Increases by 6% per rank.
Additional Detail: If the caster is on the sorcerer path an additional servant may be summoned.
Ranks 1-10: Up to 40% chance to trigger three additional melee attacks each time you attack with a hand to hand (fist) weapon. Increases by 4% per rank.
Rank 1 (Cost: 10): Each time you land a melee attack you have a 20% chance to also attack your target with Savage I (Empowered), which does 50% increased damage over Savage I.
Rank 1 (Cost: 10): Your pet will receive additional melee damage & hit points.

Rank 1 (Cost: 20): You charge at your enemy and instantly cast two Savage I attacks. If your target is suffering from Black Plague I and Blistering Malady II, you will issue a third Savage I. 30 second recast.
Additional Detail: You learn an new spell: Assault I.
Additional Detail: Your target must be at least 15 yards away.

hello ossadocy, i can assist your with y.text: Hello Ossadocy, I can assist your with your [Specializations]. These can be triggered by using your Specialization spell or skill, which you automatically learn at 70.

fyi, nearly every drop in the game (ulti.text: FYI, nearly every drop in the game (Ultimate zones onward), has had no drop removed and can be traded. Quest items will remain no drop.

improved destruction specialization: imp.text: Improved Destruction Specialization: Improved Destruction Specialization XII

your original windowed mode resolution f.text: Your original windowed mode resolution for this character could not be determined so you have received the default window layout. You may use the copy layout window to copy a layout from your original windowed mode resolution or from another character's layout. If you are using the default skin, the copy layout window will appear automatically. If you are using a custom UI, the copy layout window may be unavailable. Type "/copylayout help" for more information.

ultimate pets are now automatically buff.text: Ultimate Pets are now automatically buffed if your class can inherently summon pets and you have specialized in Destruction. You no longer need the Ultimate Pet Buff.

hello fawupuruen, i can assist your with.text: Hello Fawupuruen, I can assist your with your [Specializations]. These can be triggered by using your Specialization spell or skill, which you automatically learn at 70.

ordered_lines.text: Hello Ossadocy, I can assist your with your [Specializations]. These can be triggered by using your Specialization spell or skill, which you automatically learn at 70.
Improved Destruction Specialization: Improved Destruction Specialization XII
FYI, nearly every drop in the game (Ultimate zones onward), has had no drop removed and can be traded. Quest items will remain no drop.

Your original windowed mode resolution for this character could not be determined so you have received the default window layout. You may use the copy layout window to copy a layout from your original windowed mode resolution or from another character's layout. If you are using the default skin, the copy layout window will appear automatically. If you are using a custom UI, the copy layout window may be unavailable. Type "/copylayout help" for more information.
Ultimate Pets are now automatically buffed if your class can inherently summon pets and you have specialized in Destruction. You no longer need the Ultimate Pet Buff.
Hello Fawupuruen, I can assist your with your [Specializations]. These can be triggered by using your Specialization spell or skill, which you automatically learn at 70.
